use_cases: Displaying user profile information with header, title, and content sections
Building dashboard layouts with consistent card containers
Creating data-driven interfaces with footer actions like save or cancel
Organizing content in grid layouts with uniform card styling
Composing complex UIs by combining card sub-components for headers, titles, descriptions, and content areas
ai_summary: A Shadcn-style card component system providing reusable Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter sub-components. Built with React.forwardRef for proper ref handling and uses Tailwind classes for styling with rounded borders, shadow, and card-specific background colors. This is a foundational UI system designed for building data display interfaces, dashboards, and content containers across various industries and platforms.
